mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_group (name, owner_id, avatar, notice, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{ownerId}, #{avatar}, #{notice}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT g.*, gm.is_top, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message m WHERE m.group_id = g.id AND m.sender_id != #{userId} AND m.id > COALESCE(gm.last_read_message_id, 0)) as unread_count, (SELECT m.created_at FROM chat_message m WHERE m.group_id = g.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) as lastMessageTime FROM chat_group g JOIN group_member gm ON g.id = gm.group_id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY gm.is_top DESC, lastMessageTime DESC, g.updated_at DESC
